content:
Team: review request — please perform a focused review of the crates/ragent-server crate.

Scope and expectations:
- security-reviewer: prioritize auth, secret handling, command execution boundaries, injection risks, and unsafe external inputs. Report only high-signal issues. For each finding include: file path, code snippet, impact, and a concrete fix (diff or patch suggestion).
- performance-reviewer: identify hotspots, expensive loops, repeated or blocking I/O, unnecessary allocations, lock/contention points, and any costly sync calls. Provide measurable recommendations and low-risk changes with estimated performance benefit.
- test-reviewer: audit test coverage and failure modes within ragent-server. Identify missing edge cases, flaky tests, and untested critical paths. For each gap propose an exact test (filename and test name) and a brief implementation sketch.

Logistics:
- Work directory: crates/ragent-server
- Deliverables: one concise report per reviewer as a reply in the team mailbox. Include file paths and suggested code changes. If you find issues that require a tracked task, create a task via team_task_create and tag it with the file path and short title.
- Timeline: initial findings in one message within this session; follow-ups allowed.

Next steps:
- Claim tasks via team_task_claim before making task-specific edits or completing tasks.
- Post findings back to the team mailbox when ready.

Begin the review now and report the first set of findings.
